analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises Albania’s High Court for holding a socially distanced general meeting, congratulates judges on justice progress, and states that the US continues to strongly support justice reform as necessary for EU membership. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not promoted; no reference to US historical values or legacy. US2 (admirable society) – Not promoted; no mention of US societal groups or civil society. US3 (hostile enemies) – Not promoted; no adversary framed. US4 (force for good) – Promoted; the tweet highlights US support for justice reform, tied to human rights/rule-of-law progress and broader democratic development. US5 (great international ally) – Promoted; it emphasizes unwavering US support to an ally (Albania) in justice reform and EU integration goals. US6 (at the forefront) – Not promoted; no leadership/primacy claim about the US.
